news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Lineup with the Harbor Alpha Layering ETF

overview.description: The Harbor Alpha Layering ETF (HOLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund employs two strategies: a passive equity strategy that replicates a US large-cap index and a trend-following, managed futures strategy that applies a quantitative framework to various asset classes. HOLD was launched on Aug 13, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.

data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. ("Harbor"), an asset manager that curates a suite of actively-managed ETFs, mutual funds, and collective investment trusts, has added the Harbor...
